description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Deploy that runs on push to the master branch. Use a matrix strategy to build and deploy images across multiple Python versions and environments, including Python 2.7, 3.5, 3.6, and 3.7 on Ubuntu 18.04. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python 3.7, install dependencies with pip, and run a bash script to build and push the Docker image.
